name: Chainlash
additional_info: Right clicking after a flourish will enchain your target and pull them towards you. M1ing after the pull will perform a Crushing Kick, dealing high damage.
desc: On flourish, gain the ability to summon a chain on an enemy for 5 seconds by right clicking. This lets you whip your chain to seize and yank enemies towards you, setting them up for a crushing kick.
